title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the forgot password page renders with all required fields and controls
customPreconds: User is on the Forgot Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Email address field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email address field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Submit" button is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Submit" button should be visible and interactive.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Back to Login" link is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Back to Login" link should be visible and interactive.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the "Back to Login" link on the forgot password page navigates to the login page
customPreconds: User is on the Forgot Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Back to Login".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Login page should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the forgot password form without an email shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Forgot Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Submit" without entering an email address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the forgot password form with an invalid email format shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Forgot Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Invalid email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Submit".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Valid email required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting a valid email on the forgot password page sends a password reset email
customPreconds: User is on the Forgot Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid registered email address in the email field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Submit".
customStepsSeparated.expected: The check-inbox confirmation page should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify that a "Password Reset Request" email is received at the registered email address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password reset email should be received.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the check-inbox confirmation page renders correctly after submitting a reset request
customPreconds: User has submitted a valid email on the Forgot Password page and is on the check-inbox confirmation page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the check-inbox confirmation page is displayed.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A confirmation page indicating the reset email has been sent should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Back to Login" link is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Back to Login" link should be visible and interactive.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the "Back to Login" link on the check-inbox page navigates to the login page
customPreconds: User has submitted a valid email and is on the check-inbox confirmation page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Back to Login".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Login page should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that clicking the "Reset Password" button in the reset email opens the reset password page
customPreconds: User has submitted a valid email on the Forgot Password page and has received a "Password Reset Request" email.

customStepsSeparated.content: Open the "Password Reset Request" email in the inbox.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be accessible and opened.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click the "Reset Password" button in the email.
customStepsSeparated.expected: The Reset Password page should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the reset password page renders with all required fields and controls
customPreconds: User has clicked "Reset Password" in the reset email and is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Email address field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email address field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the New password field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: New password field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the Confirm password field is present and marked as mandatory.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Confirm password field should be visible and marked as a required field.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Reset Password" button is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Reset Password" button should be visible and interactive.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form without an email shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a new password and confirm password, leaving the email field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form with an invalid email format shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an invalid email address in the email field.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Invalid email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a matching new and confirm password.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Valid email required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form with a mismatched email shows a token error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter an email address that does not match the one used in the reset request.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Mismatched email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a matching new and confirm password.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "This password reset token is invalid." error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form without a new password shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address and a confirm password, leaving the new password field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email and confirm password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "New Password is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form without a confirm password shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address and a new password, leaving the confirm password field empty.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email and new password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Confirm Password is required" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form with a new password shorter than 8 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address and a matching confirm password.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email and confirm password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a new password with fewer than 8 characters.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Short password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Minimum 8 characters required" error message should be displayed. [inferred — verify before automation]

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form with a new password longer than 64 characters shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address and a matching confirm password.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email and confirm password fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a new password longer than 64 characters.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Oversized password should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "The password is too long" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that submitting the reset password form with mismatching new and confirm passwords shows a validation error
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter different values in the new password and confirm new password fields.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Mismatched passwords should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "New Password and Confirm Password does not match" error message should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the reset password form accepts valid credentials and confirms the password reset
customPreconds: User is on the Reset Password page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Email should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter a valid password (8–64 characters) in both the new password and confirm new password fields.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Matching passwords should be entered.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Reset confirmation page should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify that a "Your password has been changed" notification email is received at the registered address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password change notification email should be received.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the reset confirmation page renders with a success state and Log In button
customPreconds: User has successfully reset their password and is on the reset confirmation page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the reset confirmation page is displayed with a success indicator.
customStepsSeparated.expected: A success confirmation page should be displayed with a green tick icon indicating the password was reset.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify the "Log In" button is present.
customStepsSeparated.expected: "Log In" button should be visible and interactive.

customStepsSeparated.content: Verify that a "Your password has been changed" notification email is received at the registered address.
customStepsSeparated.expected: Password change notification email should be received.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that the "Log In" button on the reset confirmation page navigates to the login page
customPreconds: User has successfully reset their password and is on the reset confirmation page.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Log In".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Login page should be displayed.

title: [Forgot Password] Verify that clicking Reset Password with an expired token shows a token error
customPreconds: User initiated a password reset more than 1 hour ago and has the original "Password Reset Request" email in their inbox.

customStepsSeparated.content: Open the "Password Reset Request" email and click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: Reset Password page should be displayed.

customStepsSeparated.content: Enter the registered email address and matching new/confirm passwords.
customStepsSeparated.expected: All fields should be filled.

customStepsSeparated.content: Click "Reset Password".
customStepsSeparated.expected: "This password reset token is invalid." error message should be displayed below the confirm password field.
